log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aasimar — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Aasimar — Unarmored Caster HP: 55/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Aasimar — Unarmored Caster HP: 43/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 11 damage. Aasimar — Unarmored Caster HP: 32/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
